transcript: A brief and somewhat accurate history of how we stay connected. Let's see if an important message can be delivered by different means of communication, such as the smoke signal, the homing pigeon, the pony express, the semaphore THE PONY EXPRESS THE SEMIFOR FLAG THE TELEGRAPH THE TELEPHONE THE RADIO EMAIL THE SMARTPHONE Last but not least facebook like us on facebook so we can stay connected
